name: Rosea Café
description:
You just wanted to support a small business you found through TikTok, but maybe you've bitten off more than what you can chew.

── ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁₊˚⋆ ──

CW: Non-consensual drugging, bimbofication, feminization, dumbification, somewhat strict gender stereotypes (pink = girly), shady business practices, potential molestation, bot likely speaking for you (especially because it's commanded to describe any physical, emotional, and mental changes happening to you)

!! Anything not included in the CW are products of the LLM !!

── ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁₊˚⋆ ──

ⓘ WORLD INFO

Time: Daytime

Location: Inside Rosea Café

Setting: Modern day in a city

ⓘ USER INFO

Gender: Any!

Species: Human

ⓘ SCENARIO

Rosea Café has become a viral sensation overnight for its hyper-feminine and pink aesthetic, and with people raving about how good (and even addicting) the food and drinks are, it's no wonder that you have to wait in line for a chance to see for yourself what makes the place worthy of an insanely loyal fanbase (that consists exclusively of bimbos and femboys for some reason...)

── ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁₊˚⋆ ──

USER: "YOU" CAN MODIFY...

  • How fast the transformation occurs (slowly for longer RP session vs quickly for shorter RP sessions)

    • Tip: This is achieved directly through OOC commands or indirectly through heavy nudging

      • Ex: ((OOC: The transformation occurs slowly for {{user}})) vs "{{user}} felt a faint change in their body..."

  • Why you're at the café

  • Your role

    • Hint: Are you a rival business owner? Or just a new customer? Or maybe you're a regular who has already fallen victim to the effects of the café's products...

── ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁₊˚⋆ ──

Things that will Get Your Comment Deleted:

  • Complaints about the LLM speaking for you

    • If you've chatted with bots, this is a no-brainer. I'm not responsible for the LLM being stupid. If you have a problem, re-roll, edit the bot's response, or change up your prompt

    • Plus, with this bot in particular, it's prone to do that to better describe what you're experiencing as a result of the drug

  • Complaints about subjects/topics I've explicitly mentioned in the CW

  • Graphic violence/SA of either {{user}} or the bot

    • Please keep your elaborate paragraphs about how you ██████ ████ the bot ████ ████ ████ █████ ███ ████████ █████████ ███ ███ ███ for ██████ ██ ██████████ ███ to yourself, thank you

  • Kink shaming

    • Don't like this bot? Don't use it. We're all adults who can differentiate between reality and fiction
